title: Per Sekse
compiled_truth: Per Sekse is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-13 to 2002-03-25), Per Sekse sent 30 and received 366 emails, totalling 396 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (13), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (9), [Jeffrey Shankman](people/jeffrey-shankman) (8), [A  Shankman](people/a-shankman) (6), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _hedgefunds, deleted_items, inbox.
